input:
They gathered in Madinah in the hope that they would follow him and establish with him a new kingdom, similar to that of David and Solomon. The Prophet might have hoped that the Jews would follow him because theirs was a Divine religion which emanated from the same source as Islam. Little did he think at the beginning that blind hatred of anything that did not emanate with the Israelites would determine the Jews’ attitude towards Islam. In the early days of the Prophet’s settlement in Madinah, there were a few encouraging signs about the Jewish attitude, but the indications of a forthcoming hard struggle were much more numerous.
Source: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, Ch. 19: New Trends of Hostility

output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, Ch. 19: New Trends of Hostility

characters.name: Jewish Leader
characters.appearance: Late 40s, dark skin, sturdy build. Thick dark beard, neatly kept. Wearing a long dark woolen cloak, simple white turban, off-white linen head covering. Well-worn leather sandals. Authoritative expression, possibly hand on hip.

characters.name: Prophet Muhammad (PBUH)
characters.appearance: Early 50s, medium build, dignified upright posture. Wearing simple white thobe, beige cloak draped over shoulders, white turban with tail between shoulder blades. Simple leather sandals. Always shown from behind, face never visible. Distinguished by beige cloak and subtle warm light.

output.moral_lesson: True faith and perseverance can overcome even the greatest challenges.
output.narrative_text: In Madinah, the Jews gathered in the hope of establishing a new kingdom with the Prophet. However, their blind hatred for anything non-Jewish would ultimately lead them to reject Islam. The Prophet was unaware of this at first, but the early signs of struggle were clear.

compliance.notes: Prophet shown from behind, Jewish leader shown with full face. Emphasis on early challenges facing the Prophet in Madinah. Suitable for children.

output.image_prompt: Children's illustration in earthy tones. Exterior view of a Madinah mud-brick home with flat roof. A Jewish leader with dark skin, thick beard, and woolen cloak stands outside, looking serious. A few steps away, a man in white thobe and beige cloak, white turban, stands with back to the viewer, looking out towards the horizon. A few palm trees in the background. Warm, soft light. Medium shot, eye level. No modern objects.
